items.summary: Fix the student registration flow so that every new student who submits the /register form is correctly persisted. The registerStudent function must create both a user record and a pending student record in the local store, handle all validation errors gracefully, and redirect to /login with a success toast on completion. Debug and resolve any existing bugs (e.g., missing store writes, incorrect field mapping, or silent failures) that prevent registration from saving the student.

Add a WhatsApp CTA button with the number 9424135055 inside every course subsection across the app (course cards on the Landing page, course detail sections on /admin/courses, /student/courses, and the course selection step of /student/book). The button must open `https://wa.me/919424135055` in a new tab with a pre-filled message like 'Hi, I want to book a demo session.' The button should be visually distinct using the WhatsApp green color (#25D366) and include the WhatsApp icon.

Apply the uploaded 'The Rajat's Equation' logo (rajats-equation-logo.png) as the brand identity across the entire app. Replace any existing 'MathTutor Pro' text or placeholder logo with this logo image in: the admin sidebar header, the student sidebar header, the public landing page navbar, and the login and register page headers. Also use the logo as the browser favicon (favicon.ico / favicon.png). Maintain the logo's original dark teal color palette (#1d3d4f) when rendering it inline. Update the app name in index.html title to 'The Rajat's Equation'.
